subcodes.first_line: O thou that art negligent! Hearken unto the call of Him Who loveth thee and maketh mention of thee at this hour, and know that We have remembered thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا تنبل باشی اسمع ندآء من یحبک و یذکرک فی هذا الحین ثم اعلم بانا اذکرناک
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
